title: campanula fragilis subsp. cavolinii
intro: Campanula fragilis subsp. cavolinii, also known as the 'Fragile Bellflower', is a perennial plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects, which help in relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Campanula fragilis subsp. cavolinii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive problems. It is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil to harness its medicinal properties, and is also used in some traditional remedies for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects.
